author: garyrong
content: https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11715 i submitted a pr for improving the auth gas accounting

author: garyrong
content: Specifically it can handle the scenario such as: `a->0->b`. In the current spec, the `0->b` will be charged for auth-base state cost, but it shouldn't as the net state is not changed

author: spencer_tb
content: Don't know how didn't match the EIP here, looks correct! Will add it in the next release
